ddls:
CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "slot" INTEGER /* Slot number for the question */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Number of the question */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the question */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent question (if any) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the question */,
  "questiontext" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "questiontextformat" INTEGER /* Format of the question text (e.g., HTML, plain text) */,
  "image" TEXT /* Path to the image associated with the question */,
  "generalfeedback" TEXT /* General feedback for the question */,
  "defaultgrade" REAL /* Default grade for the question */,
  "penalty" REAL /* Penalty for incorrect answers */,
  "qtype" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., essay, match) */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the question */,
  "stamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was created */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the question */,
  "hidden" INTEGER /* Hidden status of the question (0 = visible, 1 = hidden) */,
  "timecreated" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the question was created */,
  "timemodified" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the question was last modified */,
  "createdby" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the question */,
  "modifiedby" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the question */,
  "maxmark" REAL /* Maximum mark for the question */,
  "multimedia" TEXT /* Multimedia content (e.g., video, audio) associated with the question */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the question (e.g., keywords) */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the question (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_modifiedby FOREIGN KEY ("modifiedby") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_qtype FOREIGN KEY ("qtype") REFERENCES question_types ("qtype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_createdby FOREIGN KEY ("createdby") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_types" (
  "qtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the question type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the question type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qtype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., instructor, content creator, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the feedback is for */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_format" TEXT /* Format of the feedback text (e.g., HTML, plain text) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was created */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given with the feedback (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_feedback_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_feedback_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the image is for */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_size" REAL /* Size of the image in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., PNG, JPEG) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_images_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade entry */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being graded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was graded */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade given to the question */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback given with the grade */,
  "graded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the grade was given */,
  "grading_criteria" TEXT /* Grading criteria used (e.g., rubric) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_grades_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_grades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the log is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_logs_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the version is for */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the question */,
  "version_text" TEXT /* Text of the question in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_versions_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor for the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "course_format" TEXT /* Format of the course (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_questions" (
  "course_question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course-question link */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the question in the course */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the question in the course grading */,
  "assignment_type" TEXT /* Type of assignment (e.g., quiz, homework) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_questions_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_questions_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_multimedia" (
  "multimedia_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each multimedia entry */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the multimedia is for */,
  "multimedia_path" TEXT /* File path to the multimedia */,
  "multimedia_type" TEXT /* Type of the multimedia (e.g., video, audio) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the multimedia was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("multimedia_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_multimedia_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag entry */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the tag is for */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_tags_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_difficulty_levels" (
  "difficulty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each difficulty entry */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the difficulty is for */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Level of difficulty (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "difficulty_description" TEXT /* Description of the difficulty level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("difficulty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_difficulty_levels_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic entry */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the topic is for */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "topic_description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_topics_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)
